scope: Cycle 25: Seasonal atmosphere system + bug hunt C24

bugs_found.description: _on_partir_pressed() bypassed BiomeRadial — hardcoded 'foret_broceliande' and launched directly. Fixed: now opens radial selector on first press, closes on second press.
Race condition: _animate_close() set visible=false after await, overriding a subsequent open(). Fixed: stored close tween as member, kill on open(), guard visible=false with _is_open check.
var BIOME_DATA := still using := type inference despite C24 claiming fix. Fixed to var BIOME_DATA: Dictionary =.

Lambda capture-by-reference in for loops: tween callbacks captured loop variable by reference, causing all callbacks to use last iteration value. Fixed with local variable copies (var pname/idx) in set_season_modulation(), _animate_biome_transition(), _animate_close().
Unsafe 'as Dictionary' cast in _calculate_player_maturity() — crashes if store state is non-Dictionary during early init. Fixed with is-type guard.
SFX 'partir_fanfare' played on both radial open AND close. Fixed: moved SFX inside open-only branch.

remaining_known_issues.description: Faction dashboard claimed by C22-C24 status files never existed in codebase. Queued for C26 implementation.

overall_assessment: Bug hunt C24 found 6 bugs (1 CRITICAL, 3 HIGH, 1 MEDIUM, 1 LOW), all fixed. CRITICAL: BiomeRadial was never wired into PARTIR button despite status claiming so. Feature: SeasonalAtmosphere autoload provides global seasonal particle overlay and CRTLayer color grading. Code review verified lambda capture fixes, null safety, and signal wiring. 37 total bugs fixed across 25 cycles.
